title: Bridge Essay: Social touch and human development.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.

**Social touch and human development.** — Dev Cogn Neurosci. PMID: 29731417. DOI: 10.1016/j.dcn.2018.04.009. Social touch is apowerful force in human development, shaping social reward, attachment, cognitive, communication, and emotional regulation from infancy and throughout life. In this review, we consider the question of how social touch is defined from both bottom-up and top-down perspectives. In the former category, there is aclear role for the C-touch (CT) system, which constitutes aunique submodality that mediates affective touch and contrasts with discriminative touch.
